explanation.text: **The Logic:** Option premium = Intrinsic value + Time value. ITM options have both components; ATM and OTM options have only time value (intrinsic = 0). At expiry, time value = 0, so premium = intrinsic value only. **The Trap:** Volatility affects time value but is not a separate component of the premium. **Cross-Exam Context:** Premium decomposition is tested in Series I and VIII. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Time value is always >= 0 before expiry. It decreases as expiry approaches (time decay) and becomes zero at expiry.
